Arrays & Hashing.template_name: Hash Map / Hash Set 模式
Arrays & Hashing.when_to_use: 需要 O(1) 查找、计数、去重、配对时
Arrays & Hashing.key_insight: 用空间换时间 — O(n²) 暴力搜索变 O(n) 哈希查找

Two Pointers.when_to_use: 排序数组中找配对、回文检测、原地操作时
Two Pointers.python_template:
left, right = 0, len(arr) - 1
while left < right:
    total = arr[left] + arr[right]
    if total == target: return [left, right]
    elif total < target: left += 1
    else: right -= 1
Two Pointers.key_insight: 排序 + 两端逼近，避免嵌套循环

Sliding Window.when_to_use: 连续子数组/子串的最大值、最小值、满足条件的最短/最长
Sliding Window.python_template:
left = 0
for right in range(len(arr)):
    window.add(arr[right])  # expand
    while CONDITION_VIOLATED:
        window.remove(arr[left])  # shrink
        left += 1
    result = max(result, right - left + 1)
Sliding Window.complexity: Time O(n), Space O(k) where k = window content
Sliding Window.key_insight: 右指针扩张探索，左指针收缩维护约束 — 每个元素最多进出窗口各一次

Stack.when_to_use: 找下一个更大/更小元素、括号匹配、表达式求值
Stack.key_insight: 栈维护单调递减序列 — 遇到更大的就弹出结算

Binary Search.when_to_use: 排序数组查找、搜索空间可二分、最小化/最大化问题
Binary Search.python_template:
left, right = 0, len(arr) - 1
while left <= right:
    mid = (left + right) // 2
    if arr[mid] == target: return mid
    elif arr[mid] < target: left = mid + 1
    else: right = mid - 1
Binary Search.key_insight: 每次排除一半搜索空间 — 不只用于排序数组，任何单调性都可以二分

Linked List.when_to_use: 链表反转、环检测、合并、找中点
Linked List.python_template:
# Fast-slow pointers (cycle / middle)
slow = fast = head
while fast and fast.next:
    slow = slow.next
    fast = fast.next.next
# slow is at middle (or meeting point if cycle)
Linked List.key_insight: 快慢指针解决大部分链表问题 — 环检测、找中点、找倒数第 k 个

Trees.when_to_use: 二叉树遍历、路径问题、验证 BST、层序遍历
Trees.complexity: Time O(n), Space O(h) where h = height
Trees.key_insight: 几乎所有树问题都是 DFS 递归 — 关键是定义好返回值语义

Backtracking.when_to_use: 生成所有组合/排列/子集、约束满足问题
Backtracking.complexity: Time O(2^n) or O(n!), Space O(n)
Backtracking.key_insight: 选择 → 递归 → 撤销。剪枝是优化关键

Graphs.when_to_use: 连通性、最短路径、拓扑排序、岛屿问题
Graphs.key_insight: BFS = 最短路径（无权图），DFS = 连通性/路径探索。visited 集合防止死循环

1-D Dynamic Programming.when_to_use: 最优子结构 + 重叠子问题、计数路径、最大/最小值
1-D Dynamic Programming.python_template:
dp = [0] * (n + 1)
dp[0] = BASE_CASE
for i in range(1, n + 1):
    dp[i] = TRANSITION(dp[i-1], dp[i-2], ...)
return dp[n]
1-D Dynamic Programming.complexity: Time O(n), Space O(n) → can optimize to O(1)
1-D Dynamic Programming.key_insight: 定义 dp[i] 的含义 → 找状态转移方程 → 确定 base case。先写递归再优化

Heap / Priority Queue.when_to_use: Top K 问题、合并 K 个有序序列、动态中位数
Heap / Priority Queue.python_template:
import heapq
heap = []
for item in stream:
    heapq.heappush(heap, item)
    if len(heap) > k:
        heapq.heappop(heap)
# heap contains top-k elements
Heap / Priority Queue.complexity: Time O(n log k), Space O(k)
Heap / Priority Queue.key_insight: 维护大小为 k 的堆 — 比排序整个数组高效得多

Tries.when_to_use: 前缀搜索、自动补全、词典匹配
Tries.complexity: Time O(L) per operation, Space O(N*L)
Tries.key_insight: 共享前缀 → 节省空间 + 快速前缀查询

Advanced Graphs.when_to_use: 最短路径（有权图）、最小生成树、Union-Find
Advanced Graphs.complexity: Time O((V+E) log V), Space O(V)
Advanced Graphs.key_insight: Dijkstra = BFS + 优先队列。Union-Find 用于动态连通性

2-D Dynamic Programming.when_to_use: 网格路径、字符串匹配、背包问题
2-D Dynamic Programming.complexity: Time O(n*m), Space O(n*m) → can optimize to O(m)
2-D Dynamic Programming.key_insight: 二维表格填充 — 画出表格手动填几格就能发现转移规律

Greedy.when_to_use: 局部最优 → 全局最优、区间调度、跳跃游戏
Greedy.complexity: Time O(n log n) (sorting), Space O(1)
Greedy.key_insight: 贪心的难点不是写代码，是证明贪心策略的正确性

Intervals.when_to_use: 合并重叠区间、插入区间、会议室调度
Intervals.python_template:
intervals.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
merged = [intervals[0]]
for start, end in intervals[1:]:
    if start <= merged[-1][1]:  # overlap
        merged[-1][1] = max(merged[-1][1], end)
    else:
        merged.append([start, end])
Intervals.complexity: Time O(n log n), Space O(n)
Intervals.key_insight: 排序后线性扫描 — 重叠判断：当前起点 ≤ 上一个终点

Math & Geometry.when_to_use: 数学规律、位运算技巧、几何计算
Math & Geometry.python_template:
# Example: detect cycle in number transformation
slow = fast = n
while True:
    slow = transform(slow)
    fast = transform(transform(fast))
    if slow == fast: break
Math & Geometry.key_insight: 数学题靠观察规律 — 先手算几个例子找 pattern

Bit Manipulation.when_to_use: 异或找唯一、位计数、2 的幂判断
Bit Manipulation.python_template:
# XOR to find single number
result = 0
for num in nums:
    result ^= num  # a ^ a = 0, a ^ 0 = a
return result
Bit Manipulation.key_insight: XOR 是位运算的瑞士军刀 — 自消性 (a^a=0) 解决大量问题
